name: obsidian-s3-sync-and-backup
description: Vault synchronization and scheduled backups across devices using S3-compatible storage (AWS S3, Cloudflare R2, RustFS, etc.) with optional end-to-end encryption.

scripts.test:integration: if [ -f .env ]; then node --env-file=.env node_modules/.bin/jest --config jest.integration.config.cjs; else jest --config jest.integration.config.cjs; fi
scripts.test:e2e: if [ -f .env ]; then node --env-file=.env node_modules/.bin/jest --config jest.e2e.config.cjs; else jest --config jest.e2e.config.cjs; fi
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.version: node scripts/version.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: Ceilão Labs
